fb_caption:
You did NOT drive 45 minutes over the bridge to circle a full parking lot. 🚗😤

Every summer, thousands of families hit Nauset, Craigville, or Old Silver at 11am and get turned away at the gate.

There's now a fix — and it's free. Beachgoers on Totally Cape Cod report lot status live: 🟢 spots open · 🟠 filling · 🔴 full. Two taps when you get there, and you just saved a stranger's beach day.

Check before you drive → https://totallycapecod.com/app

Tag the friend who always says "let's just try it" 👇
